@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

        interface MoveValidator
        class MovelsForward

    }
    class GameLogic
    class BoardPrinter
    class WinCondition

    class Move
    class Piece
    entity Player
}

GameLogic ..> BoardPrinter : uses

MoveValidator <|.. MoveLength : implements

MoveValidator <|.. OpponentPieceBetweenJump : implements
MoveValidator <|.. StartPieceValid : implements
MoveValidator <|.. TargetFieldEmpty : implements
MoveValidator <|.. NoOtherJumpMovePossible : implements

GameLogic ..> Player : uses

BoardPrinter ..> Piece : uses
BoardPrinter ..> Player : uses
